items.title: Ridge Labs: unifying campaign operations and revenue reporting
items.summary: Ridge Labs needed a clearer operating model between marketing and sales as pipeline goals increased.
items.challenge: The team had disconnected campaign planning and weekly reporting across multiple tools.
items.solution: Northstar implemented a shared planning cadence, lifecycle standards, and a consolidated reporting layer.
items.outcome: Pipeline forecasting became consistent, campaign launches accelerated, and team ownership became explicit.

testimonial.quote: We finally had one shared operating rhythm instead of three disconnected workflows.
testimonial.author: Dana Kim

seo.title: Ridge Labs Case Study | Northstar Systems
seo.description: How Ridge Labs improved pipeline visibility and execution speed.
